CVE-2013-4235.title: shadow: TOCTOU (time-of-check time-of-use) race condition when co ...
CVE-2013-4235.description: shadow: TOCTOU (time-of-check time-of-use) race condition when copying and removing directory trees

CVE-2023-4641.title: A flaw was found in shadow-utils. When asking for a new password, ...
CVE-2023-4641.description: A flaw was found in shadow-utils. When asking for a new password, shadow-utils asks the password twice. If the password fails on the second attempt, shadow-utils fails in cleaning the buffer used to store the first entry. This may allow an attacker with enough access to retrieve the password from the memory.
